content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: April 13, 1978

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Dwight Dickerson

Subject:

Section 82030(b)(2) does not apply to salaries and reimbursements for expenses paid by the League of California Cities to public officials serving as board members. Section 82030(b)(2) applies to funds received by the official in connection with duties performed in his official capacity. The public official is not performing such duties when working in the employ of the League of California Cities. This analysis applies in spite of the fact that the League is supported entirely by funds from the various chartered cities who are members of the League.

DD:qb

The public official is not performing such duties when working in the employ of the League of California Cities.
